arts.ttl: “I think he will be moving on” – Pundit claims Liverpool star has made up his mind
arts.sum: A number of Liverpool players are facing an uncertain future at the club. The likes of Mohamed Salah, Virgil Van Dijk and Trent Alexander-Arnold have all entered the final year of their contract at the club. But apart from them, one other player’s long term future at Anfield has come under the spotlight. arts.ttl: Club holding off on plans for Liverpool man – One of president’s ‘favourite players’
arts.sum: Liverpool’s Federico Chiesa in the January transfer window, despite plans to be ‘very active’ on the market. That’s according to Area Napoli, who say President Aurelio de Laurentiis is ‘monitoring many names’ and the Liverpool outcast is one of them. arts.ttl: Richard Keys leaves studio guests stunned as he changes his mind on Everton and Liverpool
arts.sum: Broadcaster Richard Keys has been speaking about his shift in allegiance when it comes to Merseyside rivals Everton and Liverpool

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher 'felt sorry' for Liverpool transfer who was subject to brutal Steven Gerrard dig
arts.sum: Igor Biscan made a bright start to his Liverpool career before falling out of favour and becoming a figure of fun until his final redemptive season at Anfield saw him become one unsung hero of astonishing run to Champions League glory

arts.ttl: Liverpool flop to have shock transfer 'finalised within next 2-3 days'
arts.sum: He made a surprising return to the Bundesliga, joining Werder Bremen in a move that was a massive gamble on the part of the club due to his sizeable wages and fitness issues. It is claimed that Keita and Bremen are in advanced negotiations with Hungarian giants Ferencvaros over an initial one-year loan in what would be a very surprising move.

arts.ttl: Everton fan, 15, spent £1,500 flying from Australia to watch axed Liverpool match
arts.sum: One hugely unfortunate Everton supporter has had to dig deep to travel halfway around the world for his side’s clash with Liverpool only to find out the game was postponed because of Storm Darragh

arts.ttl: When will Everton vs Liverpool be played? Possible new dates after Merseyside derby postponed
arts.sum: Packed fixture schedule makes finding an ideal date for rearranged Goodison Park clash difficult

arts.ttl: Paul Merson makes 'massive' Premier League title claim after Everton vs Liverpool postponement
arts.sum: Paul Merson thinks Liverpool's Merseyside derby postponement will give their title rivals a massive opportunity to turn the pressure on this weekend

arts.ttl: Revealed: When Liverpool and Everton might be able to play their postponed fixture after Storm Darragh saw Merseyside derby called off
arts.sum: Everton's Premier League game with Liverpool was postponed after Storm Darragh hit Merseyside on Friday with amber severe wind warnings.

arts.ttl: Huge Virgil Van Dijk Liverpool Contract Update Emerges
arts.sum: Liverpool have failed with their opening contract offer to Virgil van Dijk amid growing speculation over a summer departure.
